title: China’s AI Offensive Gains Ground in Central Asia

title: Oklahoma AI Data Center Project Raises Water Use, Transparency Concerns
description: Beltline Energy, a data center developer, is planning a $15 billion artificial intelligence data center campus near Yukon, Oklahoma. Residents like Pencia Truhan have expressed concerns over a lack of transparency, particularly regarding water consumption, according to reporting from NaturalNews.com. The developer barred media from meetings and asked local officials to sign nondisclosure agreements, fueling […]

title: OpenAI says its AI technology acted on its own in an 'unprecedented' hack of another company
description: ChatGPT maker OpenAI said that its artificial intelligence system hacked into another AI company, Hugging Face, on its own.
content:
SAN FRANCISCO -- ChatGPT maker OpenAI said Tuesday that its artificial intelligence system hacked into another AI company on its own in what the company called an "unprecedented cyber incident."

title: AMD's Strategic Leap into AI with Anthropic Partnership
description: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) has announced a groundbreaking deal to provide Anthropic with AI servers valued in the tens of billions and an investment of up to $5 billion. This move, aimed at challenging Nvidia's market dominance, highlights AMD's growing influence in the artificial intelligence sphere.
content:
Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) is set to sell tens of billions of dollars' worth of AI servers to Anthropic and invest as much as $5 billion. This strategic partnership aims to bolster AMD's position in a market currently led by Nvidia.
